metadata.title: Dervis Gómez — Full Stack Developer
metadata.description: Software Engineer with 9+ years of experience developing web applications, mobile apps and PWAs using Angular, React, Node.js, Firebase, TypeScript and modern technologies.

hero.name: Dervis Gómez
hero.subtitle: Full Stack Developer
hero.headline: <line>Building digital products</line><line>that <highlight>real companies</highlight></line><line>run on.</line>
hero.description: I design and build web platforms, mobile apps, and enterprise systems for teams across Latin America — from architecture through production deployment.
hero.heroImageAlt: Web and mobile product screenshots built by Dervis Gómez

projects.label: Work
projects.title: Products built for <highlight>real businesses</highlight>
projects.description: Case studies of platforms shipped to production — marketplaces, enterprise PWAs, corporate systems, and mobile apps built for companies across Latin America.
projects.descriptionShort: Real products in production — marketplaces, enterprise PWAs, and corporate systems.
projects.moreProjectsDescription: I've contributed to the development of multiple web, mobile and enterprise platform applications.

veyco.name: VE&CO
veyco.subtitle: Digital marketplace for buying and selling products.
veyco.description: Digital marketplace designed to connect buyers and sellers through a modern e-commerce experience, order management, product catalogs and business administration.

impact.description: Marketplace available on web and mobile app, connecting buyers and sellers in an ecosystem built to scale with the business.

marketplace.title: Full Marketplace
marketplace.description: Platform connecting buyers and sellers within a single digital ecosystem.

favorites.title: Favorites & Discovery
favorites.description: Users can save favorite products and explore new catalogs.

orders.title: Order Management
orders.description: Order administration, tracking and control of commercial operations.

catalog.title: Product Catalog
catalog.description: Structured management of products, categories and commercial listings.

userRoles.title: User Roles
userRoles.description: Differentiated experience for buyers, sellers and administrators.

adminPanel.title: Admin Dashboard
adminPanel.description: Administration and platform activity monitoring tools.

activitySummaries.title: Activity Summaries
activitySummaries.description: Indicators and metrics to monitor behavior and operations.

commercialEcosystem.title: Commercial Ecosystem
commercialEcosystem.description: Segmentation and management of buyers and sellers within the marketplace.

responsibilities.0: Developed the web frontend application with Angular.
responsibilities.1: Developed the mobile app with Ionic, Angular and Capacitor.
responsibilities.2: Built backend services with Node.js, Express, MongoDB and REST APIs.
responsibilities.4: Built product catalog and publication modules.
responsibilities.5: Integrated the web platform and mobile app with the shared backend.
responsibilities.6: Participated in deployment, maintenance and feature evolution.

area33.description: Cross-platform mobile application published on Android and iOS, delivering a seamless native experience for end users.

impact.description: Published app on both stores, delivering a native and accessible experience to end users on mobile devices.

responsibilities.0: Developed the mobile app with Ionic, Angular and Capacitor.
responsibilities.1: Integrated Firebase for authentication, database and cloud services.

responsibilities.3: Optimized performance and user experience on mobile devices.
responsibilities.4: Managed publishing and updates on Google Play and App Store.

enaex.name: Espíritu Enaex
enaex.subtitle: Corporate employee recognition system.
enaex.tagline: Corporate system · Web, Android & iOS · Production
enaex.description: Corporate organizational recognition platform designed to strengthen company culture, increase employee participation and provide strategic metrics for teams distributed across multiple countries.
enaex.organizationalImpact: Implemented for international teams with segmentation by country, plant, area, category and user, enabling analysis of participation and recognition across the organization through consolidated indicators.

impact.description: A corporate platform used by employees across multiple countries to recognize achievements, promote company values and improve organizational culture.

responsibilities.0: Developed the web application using Angular.
responsibilities.1: Developed the mobile application using Ionic and Capacitor.
responsibilities.3: Integrated Microsoft Azure Active Directory login.
responsibilities.4: Developed backend services using Firebase Functions.
responsibilities.6: Participated in architecture, maintenance and feature evolution.

multiCountry.title: Multi-country Platform

organizationalAnalytics.description: Consolidated indicators and metrics for decision-making.

plantStats.title: Plant Statistics

userMetrics.title: User Metrics

bulkImport.description: Upload of users and corporate data through Excel files.

formidavel.name: Formidável
formidavel.subtitle: Platform for process digitization and automation.
formidavel.description: Enterprise platform for operational process digitization, field inspections, document management and workflow automation. Used to capture, process and distribute information efficiently across different operational environments.

impact.description: Formidável enables organizations to replace paper forms and manual processes with digital workflows, improving operational visibility, field productivity and data quality.

responsibilities.1: Built mobile experiences using Ionic and Capacitor.
responsibilities.2: Designed and implemented core platform modules.

responsibilities.7: Built QR code and document management features.

devocion.name: Devoción Diaria
devocion.subtitle: Spiritual growth and community management platform.
devocion.tagline: Own product · PWA · Android in development
devocion.description: Helps believers build spiritual habits through devotional journaling and prayer tracking.
devocion.longDescription: Devoción Diaria combines devotional journaling, prayer requests, spiritual habit tracking and church administration tools into a single platform. The project includes a mobile experience, a progressive web application and an administrative dashboard for churches and community leaders.

impact.description: Designed and developed as an independent software product focused on helping users cultivate daily devotional and prayer habits through a modern digital experience.

0.title: Devotional journaling
0.description: Daily spiritual reflection and journaling system.

1.title: Prayer requests
1.description: Management and tracking of prayer requests.

2.title: Growth statistics
2.description: Insights into personal spiritual habits and progress.

3.title: Streak tracking
3.description: Motivation through daily consistency and habits.

4.title: Progressive Web App
4.description: Installable web experience with offline capabilities.

5.title: Church dashboard
5.description: Administrative panel for leaders and communities.

7.title: Real-time sync
7.description: Data synchronized across devices with Firestore.
